hero.headline: Run projects with clarity.
hero.sub: ribbit connects planning, tasks, tickets, testing, and knowledge in one workspace for teams that operate with precision.

login.mobileTagline: Secure access to the operational workspace.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to ribbit to continue to your workspace.
login.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.
login.inviteHint: If you don't have an account yet, create one to set your password and access the invited project.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Request access to ribbit. An administrator will review and activate your account.

errors.minPassword: Password must be at least {min} characters.

registerSuccess.title: Account created
registerSuccess.body: Your account has been created and is pending activation by an administrator. You will receive access when your account is activated.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a link shortly. Check your inbox and spam; opening it will let you set a new password and sign in.

updatePassword.title: Set new password
updatePassword.subtitle: Choose a new password to recover access to ribbit. You can then sign in as usual.
updatePassword.invalidBody: This link is no longer valid. Request a new one from reset password.
updatePassword.success: Password updated successfully. Sign in with your new password.

errors.minPassword: Password must be at least {min} characters.
